attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
RANK() OVER 
			(ORDER BY 
				STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT, 
				STLINE_BK.SS_CODE) +  SMLINE_MAX.MAX_LINE_SGK_VAL  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 		SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
STLINE_BK.SS_CODE 					SS_CODE,
USER 								EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 				EDW_CREATE_DTM,
'Y' DV_NRT_BATCH_FLAG,
  -999 AS SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT,
  NULL AS SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,
 'UNK' AS MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD
FROM 
(
SELECT 
DISTINCT SBOOLA.LINE_ID 		SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 		SS_CODE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_BO_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SBOOLA
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
						ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BO') )  STLINE_BK,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY),0)  MAX_LINE_SGK_VAL
    FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT) SMLINE_MAX
	WHERE NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT SSOL 
			WHERE SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=	STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
	 	 	AND 	SSOL.SS_CODE=	STLINE_BK.SS_CODE	)	
	AND  NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM  
			(SELECT 
				DISTINCT EBOOLA.LINE_ID 	LINE_ID,
				NSSC_EX.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 	SS_CODE
		 	FROM  
			$$EXCEPDB.EX_BO_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL EBOOLA  
			  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_EX 
						ON(NSSC_EX.GLOBAL_NAME='BO')  
		)EXCEP_BK
	WHERE 	EXCEP_BK.LINE_ID=STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
			AND  EXCEP_BK.SS_CODE= STLINE_BK.SS_CODE)

EBOOLA.	FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE            	,
EBOOLA.	CDB_DATA_SOURCE               	,
EBOOLA.	CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME              	,
EBOOLA.	CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME              	,
EBOOLA.	CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ               	,
EBOOLA.	BATCH_ID                      	,
EBOOLA.	QUEUE_ID                      	,
EBOOLA.	PROCESS_SET_ID                	,
EBOOLA.	Q_CREATION_DATE               	,
EBOOLA.	Q_UPDATE_DATE                 	,
EBOOLA.	ACTION_CODE                   	,
EBOOLA.	CREATE_DATETIME ,
EBOOLA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,
EBOOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF           
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_BO_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL EBOOLA 
WHERE 
EBOOLA.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_BO_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SBOOLA
WHERE EBOOLA.LINE_ID=SBOOLA.LINE_ID)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY EBOOLA.LINE_ID	ORDER BY EBOOLA.CREATE_DATETIME DESC)  =1

SELECT 
RANK() OVER 
			(ORDER BY 
				STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT, 
				STLINE_BK.SS_CODE) +  SMLINE_MAX.MAX_LINE_SGK_VAL  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 		SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
STLINE_BK.SS_CODE 					SS_CODE,
USER 								EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 				EDW_CREATE_DTM,
'Y' DV_NRT_BATCH_FLAG,
  -999 AS SK_SBP_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT,
 NULL AS SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT,
 'UNK' AS MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD
FROM 
(
SELECT 
DISTINCT SUOOLA.LINE_ID 		SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 		SS_CODE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_UO_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SUOOLA
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
						ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO') )  STLINE_BK,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY),0)  MAX_LINE_SGK_VAL
    FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT) SMLINE_MAX
	WHERE NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT SSOL 
			WHERE SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=	STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
	 	 	AND 	SSOL.SS_CODE=	STLINE_BK.SS_CODE	)	
	AND  NOT EXISTS
		(SELECT 1 FROM  
			(SELECT 
				DISTINCT EUOOLA.LINE_ID 	LINE_ID,
				NSSC_EX.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 	SS_CODE
		 	FROM  
			$$EXCEPDB.EX_UO_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL EUOOLA  
			  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_EX 
						ON(NSSC_EX.GLOBAL_NAME='UO')  
		)EXCEP_BK
	WHERE 	EXCEP_BK.LINE_ID=STLINE_BK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
			AND  EXCEP_BK.SS_CODE= STLINE_BK.SS_CODE)

SBOOLA.	SOURCE_DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID       	,
SBOOLA.	UNIT_COST                     	,
SBOOLA.	UNIT_PERCENT_BASE_PRICE       	,
SBOOLA.	LINE_TYPE_ID                  	,
SBOOLA.	ORDERED_ITEM                  	,
SBOOLA.	ORDERED_ITEM_ID               	,
SBOOLA.	ORDERED_QUANTITY2             	,
SBOOLA.	ORDER_SOURCE_ID               	,
SBOOLA.	ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF         	,
SBOOLA.	PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS          	,
SBOOLA.	PRICE_LIST_ID                 	,
SBOOLA.	PRICE_REQUEST_CODE            	,
SBOOLA.	PRICING_QUANTITY              	,
SBOOLA.	REQUEST_ID                    	,
SBOOLA.	RETURN_ATTRIBUTE1             	,
SBOOLA.	RETURN_ATTRIBUTE2             	,
SBOOLA.	RETURN_CONTEXT                	,
SBOOLA.	SALESREP_ID                   	,
SBOOLA.	SALES_DOCUMENT_TYPE_CODE      	,
SBOOLA.	INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID         	,
SBOOLA.	INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID             	,
SBOOLA.	ATTRIBUTE11                   	,
SBOOLA.	ATTRIBUTE13                   	,
SBOOLA.	CONTEXT                       	,
SBOOLA.	CUST_PO_NUMBER                	,
SBOOLA.	DELIVER_TO_CONTACT_ID         	,
SBOOLA.	DELIVER_TO_ORG_ID             	,
SBOOLA.	EARLIEST_SHIP_DATE            	,
SBOOLA.	FOB_POINT_CODE                	,
SBOOLA.	FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE            	,
SBOOLA.	CDB_DATA_SOURCE               	,
SBOOLA.	CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME              	,
SBOOLA.	CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME              	,
SBOOLA.	CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ               	,
SBOOLA.	BATCH_ID                      	,
SBOOLA.	QUEUE_ID                      	,
SBOOLA.	PROCESS_SET_ID                	,
SBOOLA.	Q_CREATION_DATE               	,
SBOOLA.	Q_UPDATE_DATE                 	,
SBOOLA.	ACTION_CODE                   	,
SBOOLA.	CREATE_DATETIME               	,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE ,
SBOOLA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,
SBOOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF		
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_BO_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SBOOLA
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
			WHERE SBOOLA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
OR
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
			WHERE SBOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )	 
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
			WHERE SBOOLA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SO
			WHERE NSSC_SO.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE AND SBOOLA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT	
			AND	NSSC_SO.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )

SUOOLA.	SHIPPABLE_FLAG                	,
SUOOLA.	SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS         	,
SUOOLA.	SOLD_FROM_ORG_ID              	,
SUOOLA.	SOLD_TO_ORG_ID                	,
SUOOLA.	SOURCE_DOCUMENT_ID            	,
SUOOLA.	SOURCE_DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID       	,
SUOOLA.	UNIT_COST                     	,
SUOOLA.	UNIT_PERCENT_BASE_PRICE       	,
SUOOLA.	LINE_TYPE_ID                  	,
SUOOLA.	ORDERED_ITEM                  	,
SUOOLA.	ORDERED_ITEM_ID               	,
SUOOLA.	ORDERED_QUANTITY2             	,
SUOOLA.	ORDER_SOURCE_ID               	,
SUOOLA.	ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF         	,
SUOOLA.	PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS          	,
SUOOLA.	PRICE_LIST_ID                 	,
SUOOLA.	PRICE_REQUEST_CODE            	,
SUOOLA.	PRICING_QUANTITY              	,
SUOOLA.	REQUEST_ID                    	,
SUOOLA.	RETURN_ATTRIBUTE1             	,
SUOOLA.	RETURN_ATTRIBUTE2             	,
SUOOLA.	RETURN_CONTEXT                	,
SUOOLA.	SALESREP_ID                   	,
SUOOLA.	SALES_DOCUMENT_TYPE_CODE      	,
SUOOLA.	INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID         	,
SUOOLA.	INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID             	,
SUOOLA.	ATTRIBUTE11                   	,
SUOOLA.	ATTRIBUTE13                   	,
SUOOLA.	CONTEXT                       	,
SUOOLA.	CUST_PO_NUMBER                	,
SUOOLA.	DELIVER_TO_CONTACT_ID         	,
SUOOLA.	DELIVER_TO_ORG_ID             	,
SUOOLA.	EARLIEST_SHIP_DATE            	,
SUOOLA.	FOB_POINT_CODE                	,
SUOOLA.	FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE            	,
SUOOLA.	CDB_DATA_SOURCE               	,
SUOOLA.	CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME              	,
SUOOLA.	CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME              	,
SUOOLA.	CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ               	,
SUOOLA.	BATCH_ID                      	,
SUOOLA.	QUEUE_ID                      	,
SUOOLA.	PROCESS_SET_ID                	,
SUOOLA.	Q_CREATION_DATE               	,
SUOOLA.	Q_UPDATE_DATE                 	,
SUOOLA.	ACTION_CODE                   	,
SUOOLA.	CREATE_DATETIME               	,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE ,
SUOOLA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,
SUOOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF	
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_UO_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SUOOLA
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
			WHERE SUOOLA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
OR
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
			WHERE SUOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
			WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )	 
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
			WHERE SUOOLA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SO
			WHERE NSSC_SO.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE AND SUOOLA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT	
			AND	NSSC_SO.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
